name: @ds/argus
description: Argus — DS2 competitor-watch engine. Observes a few named competitors weekly, detects what changed (pricing/offers/content/SEO/social/reviews/hiring) with a pure deterministic diff core, scores each change's impact by rules, and uses Claude only to write the weekly briefing + recommendations from the computed facts. Honest by construction: code owns every number; the model owns prose.
